## Summary

<!-- What changes, and what user-visible or contract-level problem does it solve? -->

## Evidence model

- [ ] Measured, estimated, inferred, unavailable, and not-observed facts remain distinct.
- [ ] No client render, playout, human-heard, network-quality, or global-clock claim is invented.
- [ ] Contract/generated artifact changes are committed together, or this PR does not change them.

## Privacy and security

- [ ] Tests and fixtures use synthetic sentinel data only.
- [ ] No transcript, recording, phone number, credential, signed URL, or customer identifier is committed.
- [ ] New capture/export/storage paths have fail-closed privacy coverage.

## Verification

<!-- List exact commands and meaningful manual checks. -->

## Compatibility and release

- [ ] Public API, persisted schema, adapter, dependency-range, and migration impacts are documented.
- [ ] Release notes or documentation are updated when users must act.
